summary: Completed frontend testing of WayofDojo Junior Dashboard Bento Grid refactoring. All requested features verified: Login flow, Bento Grid layout with iOS-style widgets, Maître Tanaka card with portrait image, Stats cards (XP, Streak, Grade), Techniques card with navigation, Dojo Virtuel card with 'Jouer' button, 7 Vertus section with all 7 kanji characters, Défi du jour section, Mini-défis section, Ceintures card, Trophées card, and floating 'Parle-moi' button with Tanaka avatar.
critical_code_review_comments: JuniorDashboard.tsx correctly implements Bento Grid layout with CSS grid (grid-cols-4 md:grid-cols-6)

All Bento cards have proper data-testid attributes for testing (bento-tanaka, bento-xp, bento-streak, bento-grade, bento-techniques, bento-dojo-virtuel, bento-7-vertus, bento-defi-jour, bento-mini-defis, bento-ceintures, bento-trophees)
Maître Tanaka card displays portrait image from /images/tanaka/portrait.png correctly
7 Vertus section displays all 7 kanji characters (礼, 勇, 克, 謙, 仁, 注, 責) with virtue names
Navigation from Techniques card to /techniques page works correctly
Navigation from Dojo Virtuel card to /dojo-virtuel page works correctly
Floating 'Parle-moi' button with Tanaka avatar visible in bottom right corner
JourneyPath component integrated correctly with 6 steps and progression tracking
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Junior Dashboard Bento Grid layout fully tested. All cards display correctly with proper styling and navigation. The layout uses CSS grid with responsive columns (4 on mobile, 6 on desktop). All interactive elements have data-testid attributes. Tanaka intro dialog appears on first visit and stores user's name in localStorage.
